scripts.dev: concurrently -n "Backend,Frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix buynest-backend" "npm run dev --prefix buynest-frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd buynest-backend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../buynest-frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
